description:
Start building with Builder.io: https://builder.io.plug.dev/VhE89wz

If you're vibe coding new software, these are the must know UI/UX mistakes that instantly give away you're using AI. We'll cover how to super easily upgrade your UI's so your users are blown away, all in under 7 minutes!

Enjoying the videos? Subscribe for more!
@KoleJain 

Figma Files:
https://www.kolejain.com/resources?scrollTo=vibe-coded-saas
fulltitle: 5 SaaS UI/UX mistakes that SCREAM you Vibe Code
